title: AN ACT GRANTING TO RAFAEL CONSING A FRANCHISE TO INSTALL, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN AN ELECTRIC LIGHT, HEAT AND POWER SYSTEM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN CARLOS, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3982 / 49 OG No. 9, 3808 (September, 1953)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 971, June 20, 1953 ]

AN ACT GRANTING TO RAFAEL CONSING A FRANCHISE TO INSTALL, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN AN ELECTRIC LIGHT, HEAT AND POWER SYSTEM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN CARLOS, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL.
